artifacts.name: Access Kit source release
artifacts.sbom: Dependency audit and package lock retained with release evidence
artifacts.provenance: Git tag, commit, and CI validation evidence
artifacts.signature: GitHub release provenance and signed commit or tag when configured

artifacts.name: rebac-api container image
artifacts.sbom: Buildx SBOM metadata from container-release workflow
artifacts.provenance: Buildx provenance plus GitHub artifact attestation
artifacts.signature: Keyless cosign signature for the immutable digest

artifacts.name: rebac CLI binary package
artifacts.sbom: npm package dependency metadata and lockfile audit evidence
artifacts.provenance: npm provenance when AK-031 package publication lands
artifacts.signature: npm package integrity plus provenance statement

artifacts.name: API contracts SDK package
artifacts.sbom: npm package dependency metadata and lockfile audit evidence
artifacts.provenance: npm provenance for published SDK packages
artifacts.signature: npm package integrity plus provenance statement

artifacts.name: Access Kit docs site
artifacts.sbom: Documentation source paths retained in release manifest
artifacts.provenance: Git tag and CI docs validation evidence
artifacts.signature: Source release provenance and commit verification

compatibility.notes: Node 22 is the runtime baseline and both versions run in CI.
Pinned by the root packageManager field.
Backward-compatible additions are allowed in minor releases.

compatibility.supported: rebac-api image built from the runtime Dockerfile target

compatibility.notes: Schema changes require a manifest version bump.

policies.cveDisclosurePath: GitHub Security Advisory CVE request before public disclosure
